title: lotus nevadensis var. douglasii
intro: Lotus nevadensis var. douglasii, also known as Douglas's lotus or lotus, is a flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotus nevadensis var. douglasii include relief from fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as support for the digestive system and immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
